title: Feature request: Row Height in boards
excerpt:
Hi Monday! 
Avid user here - I would be interested to know if it’s/will be possible to edit row heights in boards? This is needed by us for columns such as Long Text, where we’d like to have the text visible at all times…

posts.author: Horizonsong (Karo Zieminski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday!
Avid user here - I would be interested to know if it’s/will be possible to edit row heights in boards? This is needed by us for columns such as Long Text, where we’d like to have the text visible at all times, without the need to hover over it. That would significantly increase our use of your app and allow us to transition from Excel that has that function.

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed - I was inspired by Monday’s “Pets” board but with the row height so low, the photos are really small
